summary:
Plan to fix inconsistent reference images by:
1. Reordering Step 2: World Bible runs FIRST, then Characters and Locations receive historical context
2. Upgrading World Bible prompt to output faction-specific colors, heraldry, armor, architecture
3. Upgrading Characters prompt to require specific costume details (colors, emblems, weapons)
4. Upgrading Locations prompt to require Architecture, Environment, Key Props, Atmosphere + fixed camera angle
5. Fixing field name mismatch (real_name vs original_name)
